Draft a blameless Lattix incident postmortem.

Use this format:
# Incident: <title>

## Summary
What happened, duration, impact.

## Impact
Users, systems, data, revenue, SLO/SLA.

## Timeline
Use absolute timestamps where known. Mark gaps as TODO.

## Root Cause
Technical and process contributors. No blame.

## Detection
How it was detected and what should improve.

## Response
What worked, what slowed response, escalation notes.

## Resolution
Fix, rollback, roll-forward, mitigation.

## Prevention
Action items with owner, priority, and due date:
- `TODO(<owner>, <action>, <reason>, <date>)`

## Follow-up Risks
Remaining risk and monitoring.

Rules:
- Do not invent facts.
- Separate confirmed facts from hypotheses.
- Do not include secrets, private customer data, or sensitive logs.
